title: Principal Radiologist at Boehringer Ingelheim India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Boehringer Ingelheim India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Boehringer Ingelheim India in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India:
Boehringer Ingelheim India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India!
